mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (user_id, name, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id FROM items i WHERE i.id = #{id}

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id FROM items i WHERE i.external_id = #{externalId}

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id FROM items i WHERE i.user_id = #{userId}
